# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data, optimized for quick deployment

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC for the application instances

  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet for the application instances

  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: Existing EC2 KeyPair name for SSH access

  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3.xlarge
      - m5.large
      - m5.xlarge
      - m5.2xlarge
    Description: EC2 instance type

  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Number of EC2 instances to launch

  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI ID for the EC2 instances

  VolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 50
    MinValue: 8
    MaxValue: 16384
    Description: Size of the application data EBS volume in GiB

  VolumeType:
    Type: String
    Default: gp3
    AllowedValues:
      - gp3
      - gp2
      - io1
      - io2
      - st1
      - sc1
    Description: EBS volume type for application data

  VolumeIops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3000
    MinValue: 100
    MaxValue: 16000
    Description: EBS IOPS for the application data volume if supported

  VolumeThroughput:
    Type: Number
    Default: 125
    MinValue: 125
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: EBS throughput in MiB/s for gp3 volumes

  RootVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 20
    MinValue: 8
    MaxValue: 1024
    Description: Root volume size in GiB

Conditions:
  UseGp3Settings: !Equals [!Ref VolumeType, gp3]

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  ApplicationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  ApplicationInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApplicationRole

  ApplicationLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref ApplicationInstanceProfile
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
              VolumeType: gp3
              DeleteOnTermination: true
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvdb
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: !Ref VolumeSizeGiB
              VolumeType: !Ref VolumeType
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              Iops: !If [UseGp3Settings, !Ref VolumeIops, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
              Throughput: !If [UseGp3Settings, !Ref VolumeThroughput, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]

  ApplicationInstances:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      MinSize: !Ref InstanceCount
      MaxSize: !Ref InstanceCount
      DesiredCapacity: !Ref InstanceCount
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref SubnetId
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref ApplicationLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt ApplicationLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-app
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security group ID for the application instances
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup

  InstanceProfileName:
    Description: IAM instance profile name
    Value: !Ref ApplicationInstanceProfile

  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Auto Scaling group name
    Value: !Ref ApplicationInstances
